<<<<<<< HEAD [{"ePrd_ID":1,"name":"Kavit\u00e4ten","kurz":"","beschreibung":"","optionen":"4 Fach,8 Fach","deleted":0},{"ePrd_ID":2,"name":"VE","kurz":"","beschreibung":"","optionen":"1000,500,400,2000,2500,465","deleted":0}] ======= [{"ePrd_ID":1,"name":"Testt","kurz":"TT","beschreibung":"sfydhsdfyghartg ydfga a f adf df agfa","optionen":"fg,gh,hj,jk","deleted":0},{"ePrd_ID":2,"name":"TEST2","kurz":"T2","beschreibung":"Dies ist ein zweiter Parameter um die Funktionalit\u00e4t der Erweiterungen zu \u00fcberpr\u00fcfen.","optionen":"arg1,agr2312,rga233,dfgh,uiolu,34e","deleted":0},{"ePrd_ID":1002,"name":"Test","kurz":"T","beschreibung":"Non","optionen":"T1,T2,T5","deleted":0},{"ePrd_ID":1003,"name":"raj T2","kurz":"","beschreibung":"","optionen":"","deleted":0},{"ePrd_ID":1033,"name":"tesr1","kurz":"test2","beschreibung":"LOREM IPSUM","optionen":"test,test1,,test,test1,test","deleted":0},{"ePrd_ID":1034,"name":"testtest","kurz":"testtest","beschreibung":"test","optionen":"test,test1,test3","deleted":0},{"ePrd_ID":1242,"name":"","kurz":"","beschreibung":"","optionen":"","deleted":0},{"ePrd_ID":1243,"name":"","kurz":"","beschreibung":"","optionen":"","deleted":0},{"ePrd_ID":1244,"name":"","kurz":"","beschreibung":"","optionen":"","deleted":0},{"ePrd_ID":1245,"name":"","kurz":"","beschreibung":"","optionen":"","deleted":0},{"ePrd_ID":1246,"name":"","kurz":"","beschreibung":"","optionen":"","deleted":0},{"ePrd_ID":1247,"name":"","kurz":"","beschreibung":"","optionen":"","deleted":0},{"ePrd_ID":1248,"name":"","kurz":"","beschreibung":"","optionen":"","deleted":0},{"ePrd_ID":1249,"name":"","kurz":"","beschreibung":"","optionen":"","deleted":0},{"ePrd_ID":1250,"name":"","kurz":"","beschreibung":"","optionen":"","deleted":0},{"ePrd_ID":1251,"name":"test","kurz":"test","beschreibung":"dsf","optionen":"test","deleted":0},{"ePrd_ID":1252,"name":"test","kurz":"test","beschreibung":"dsf","optionen":"test","deleted":0}] >>>>>>> ec40b495cf95be2dd3ab8d4af921c04f92d6f240
